message:
feat(simulation): add Typing, Paste, and Mouse event actions to scenario engine

Extends the simulation EventAction enum with three new interaction types
for richer resize/reflow test scenarios that model real user behavior:

- Typing: simulates interactive keyboard input (content = typed payload)
- Paste: simulates bracketed paste (content = pasted text)
- Mouse: simulates mouse interactions (name/content = interaction token)

All three participate in timeline attribution (is_resize_timeline_action)
so they generate proper timing probes in resize performance analysis.

Changes:
- simulation.rs: new variants, as_str(), validation requiring non-empty
  content for Typing/Paste and non-empty name|content for Mouse
- main.rs: match arm coverage for the new variants in robot mode output
- proptest_simulation.rs: property test generators and assertions updated
  for the expanded variant set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
